meaning: adj.小配件的,小玩意的,小发明的
examples: Maybe you've been to one of our reader meetups, or heard about the good gadgety times that roll when Engadget comes to town.
The Vulcan Flipstart is one of those products that just gets you juiced up about gadgets, because really, what's more gadgety than a full-fledged computer that you can slide into a coat pocket?
